stories.title: July 4 in COS — Your Complete Family Guide to Fireworks and Celebrations

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
COS July 4 options this Saturday:

🎆 Star-Spangled Symphony at Ford Amphitheater — tickets from $18, fireworks at 9 PM
🎆 Banning Lewis Ranch — free, bounce houses, 2 bands, 30 food trucks, fireworks 9:15 PM
🎆 Palmer Lake — free, 4–10 PM

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Banning Lewis Ranch July 4 — free community event.

Vista Park Pavilion (8833 Vista Del Pico Blvd), 3 PM start. Free bounce houses 4–7 PM, Tiny Pockets + Funkology live, 30 food trucks, fireworks at 9:15 PM.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings [URL]

article.headline: Your COS Family Guide to July 4, 2026 — Fireworks, Free Events, and What to Know

stories.title: Recall Alert — CooCooBaby Baby Loungers Pose Suffocation and Fall Hazard

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
RECALL ALERT: CooCooBaby baby loungers recalled for suffocation and fall risk.

2,355 units. Sold on Amazon + CooCooBabyOfficial.com, Dec 2024–March 2026 ($35–$70).

Stop use now. Email photo of destroyed lounger for full refund.

#COSParenting #COSKids [URL]

article.headline: Stop Use Now: CPSC Recalls CooCooBaby Baby Loungers for Suffocation Risk

stories.title: Water Safety Reminder for COS Families — Drowning Is Preventable

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Drowning is the No. 1 cause of accidental death for Colorado kids under 4.

Swim lessons reduce the risk by 88%. A four-sided pool fence cuts it by 83%.

This weekend: know where your kids are near water.

#COSParenting #COSKids [URL]

article.headline: Water Safety for COS Families: What the Stats Show and What Actually Prevents Drowning

image_concepts.label: Image

**Facebook Image (1200x630)**

Sunny backyard setting, green lawn, warm summer light. Clean bottom third (pool deck or grass) for text overlay. No text, no logos. Joyful but supervised scene. Photorealistic illustration style.

stories.title: Fireworks Safety — What COS Families Need to Know Before July 4

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Reminder for COS families: consumer fireworks are banned in Colorado Springs — always.

Stage I fire restrictions in unincorporated El Paso County also prohibit use.

The safest July 4 for kids is a public show from 500+ feet away.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings [URL]

article.headline: Before July 4: What Colorado Springs Parents Should Know About Fireworks and Kids

stories.title: PPLD Summer Adventure Is Halfway Done — 31 Days to Get Kids Enrolled

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Today is the halfway point of PPLD Summer Adventure — 31 days left.

Free, all ages, no registration required. Grand prizes include a Broadmoor Cloud Camp stay. 14 locations + 2 bookmobiles.

If you haven't started, there's still time.

#COSParenting #PikesPeakParenting [URL]
